finishers.three_adjectives: Steady: finished a year without a missed collection log. Observant: caught a bad coil before it emptied. Direct: told me a stop was unsafe to service at night.
finishers.last_book: Road atlas habits plus a safety brief from DMV site last month. Takeaway: backup lighting in truck.
finishers.define_success: Every machine serviced right, cash logged, home safe.

examples.operator_note: Resume was fine. Finishers sold me. This is the retention hire.

examples.context: Same role, great driving record on paper

finishers.three_adjectives: Hard-working, passionate, team player. Accomplishments: I always try my best.
finishers.define_success: Getting paid and not having a boss breathe down my neck.

examples.operator_note: Resume almost talked me into it. Three questions saved a month of pain.

finishers.three_adjectives: Patient: de-escalated a line when POS froze. Honest: admitted wrong ring before customer had to. Quick: learned opening checklist in two shifts.
finishers.last_book: Short stories on audiobook during commute. Takeaway: people want to be seen first.
finishers.define_success: Regulars leave happier than they came in.

finishers.three_adjectives: Curious: built a CSV parser for Dex exports. Careful: version-controls before touching prod. Blunt: tells me when my idea won't work.
finishers.last_book: O'Reilly pocket guide on APIs. Takeaway: read error messages first.
finishers.define_success: System stays up. Owner understands what broke.

examples.operator_note: Technical gate first. Same three finishers still matter for a nerd who has to talk to you.

examples.context: Ex-corporate manager applying for part-time warehouse

finishers.three_adjectives: Organized: ran a team of 12. Strategic: cut shrink 8%. Restless: left corp because meetings ate the day.
finishers.last_book: Business book last year. Takeaway vague.
finishers.define_success: Building something real with my hands again.

examples.operator_note: Will they leave in 90 days when something corporate opens? 48h second chat on why this role.

finishers.three_adjectives: Funny, friendly, easy-going. Accomplishments: people like me.

examples.context: Owner's first hire ever, nervous interviewer

finishers.three_adjectives: Reliable: never late at last job 2 years. Teachable: asked for checklist on day one. Calm: didn't panic when I fumbled the interview.
finishers.last_book: YouTube tutorials on espresso. Takeaway: grind size matters.
finishers.define_success: Shop opens smooth even when I'm not here.

examples.operator_note: Owner doesn't need corpo HR. Needs same three questions and notes.

finishers.three_adjectives: Punctual: 14 years same delivery route elsewhere. Thorough: manager cited zero cash discrepancies. Quiet: doesn't need chatter to work.
finishers.last_book: Haven't read a book in years. Listens to route podcasts. Takeaway: check MDB error codes before calling tech.
finishers.define_success: Done when the list is done right.

examples.operator_note: Book answer was honest. Podcast takeaway was real. Hire.
